query:
ALTER TABLE content 
ADD COLUMN monthlyPlanId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER clientId,
ADD COLUMN scopeId INT AFTER monthlyPlanId,
ADD COLUMN strategyId INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER scopeId,
ADD COLUMN topicTitle VARCHAR(255) AFTER status,
ADD COLUMN topicDescription TEXT AFTER topicTitle,
ADD COLUMN planTitle VARCHAR(255) AFTER topicDescription,
ADD COLUMN platform ENUM('linkedin', 'facebook', 'instagram', 'twitter', 'tiktok', 'youtube', 'blog', 'newsletter', 'gmb') AFTER planTitle,
ADD COLUMN contentFormat VARCHAR(64) AFTER platform,
ADD COLUMN copyBody TEXT AFTER scheduledDate,
ADD COLUMN copyHashtags TEXT AFTER copyBody,
ADD COLUMN copyCta TEXT AFTER copyHashtags,
ADD COLUMN mediaUrls TEXT AFTER copyCta,
ADD COLUMN publishedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER mediaUrls,
ADD COLUMN publishedUrl TEXT AFTER publishedAt;
